sol_dispositions: Reframe S198 as qualification of a multi-component package, not causal isolation of dependency direction.
Define eligibility identically and operationally for author and judge.
Replace prove/ensure claims with screening language and retain Luna calibration as NOT_MEASURED.
Require atomic points and freeze an exhaustive facet precedence.
Run the synthetic question-schema canary before packet selection and real-cohort calls.
Freeze exact SDKs, models, output caps, request maximums and accounting prices.
fable_dispositions: Keep zero failures as a conservative GO rule, but treat one Luna disagreement as weak evidence rather than statistical falsification.
Report the remaining eligible inventory and post-selection reserve after all historical exclusions.
Declare facet precedence as an S198 change motivated only by S197 aggregate counts and prohibit item-level reuse.
Replace proof language with screen language.
Label excerpt-withholding context starvation as an alternative explanation for question-rendering failures.
reason: The user directed the work away from review convergence and back toward increasing facts OK.
next: Implement and verify the deterministic synthetic question-schema canary before selecting a fresh S198 cohort.
